report.summary: Cycle 5 standup: 3 additional agent cycles (design, community, eod) completed since v4. 2 learn guides (Alpenglow, DefAI) fully polished with OG images, UX fixes, community content drafted. Deploy blocker resolved (commit 5dad971). 607 published slugs, 2 in queue. 21 total agent cycles today.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA FROM V4 STANDUP: 3 new agent cycles completed — design (UX audit + OG images for Alpenglow & DefAI), community (4 tweets + newsletter inserts + Discord/Telegram announcements), eod (full QA pass confirming 4/6 API routes healthy, 0/2 new pages deployed yet).

DEPLOY STATUS: Unchanged from v4 — commit 5dad971 resolved the P0 blocker. Queued redeploy 8LwjxJAgZ was pending as of eod report. If Vercel auto-deploy connected, 607 published slugs should be live. New Alpenglow + DefAI pages NOT yet in PUBLISHED_PAGES (still in queue).

CONTENT PIPELINE: Both new guides now fully production-ready — content written (3,200 + 3,500 words), SEO metadata complete, OG social images created, UX improvements (breadcrumbs, scroll) applied, community promotion materials (tweets, newsletter, Discord) drafted. Only remaining step: promote from PUBLISH_QUEUE → PUBLISHED_PAGES.

MARKET DATA (last known, egress blocked): BTC $68,688 (+1.94%), ETH $2,133 (+3.75%), SOL $83.86 (+1.08%), F&G 8 (Extreme Fear, 54-day streak). CoinGecko/Alternative.me egress still blocked from sandbox.

SEO NOTE: With deploy landed and 607 slugs indexed, the 7-day indexing gap from build failures should be resolving. GSC coverage improvement expected within 48-72h of the deploy. The 2 queued guides (stablecoin payments + omnichain DeFi from v4) + 2 new guides (Alpenglow + DefAI) represent 4 pages of fresh high-intent content ready for next publish cycle.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE STATUS: 5th standup of Apr 1. All 6 agent types have run today: standup ×5 (this), build ×3, publish ×2, design ×4, community ×3, eod ×4. Total: 21 agent cycles today (this is the 21st).

V4 PRIORITIES STATUS: (1) Promote 2 queue items — NOT YET DONE (stablecoin payments + omnichain DeFi still in PUBLISH_QUEUE). (2) Batch-scaffold 103 missing page.tsx — NOT STARTED. (3) Q1 market recap — NOT STARTED.

COMPLETED SINCE V4: Design polish pass on both new guides (breadcrumbs, scroll UX, OG images). Community content drafted for both guides (4 tweets, newsletter inserts, Discord/Telegram). EOD QA pass confirmed existing pages healthy.

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS: P1 — 103 missing page.tsx for published slugs (17% gap, unchanged all day). P2 — 147 TS errors (stable, non-blocking). P3 — CoinGecko free tier rate limit risk. P3 — defi-yields no stale fallback.

PUBLISH_QUEUE: Still 2 items from v4 (stablecoin-payments-infrastructure-guide-2026, omnichain-defi-unified-liquidity-guide-2026). Plus 2 new guides (Alpenglow, DefAI) marked as queued but not yet formally added to PUBLISH_QUEUE config file. Effective queue: 4 pages.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — PROMOTE ALL 4 QUEUED PAGES: The pipeline is stacking up — stablecoin payments, omnichain DeFi, Solana Alpenglow, and DefAI guides are all production-ready with full SEO + community assets. Run a publish cycle to move all 4 to PUBLISHED_PAGES and trigger indexing. This is the highest-leverage action available.

PRIORITY 2 — BATCH-SCAFFOLD 103 MISSING PAGE.TXX: This has been a P1 carry-over all day. 103 published slugs returning noindex due to missing page.tsx is the single biggest indexing surface unlock. Needs dedicated build cycle focus — not getting picked up organically.

PRIORITY 3 — VERIFY DEPLOY HEALTH: The commit 5dad971 resolved the build failure, but the queued redeploy (8LwjxJAgZ) status hasn't been confirmed live. Next devops cycle should verify production is serving the latest build and all 607 slugs are returning 200.

metrics.label: 💰 Actual Cost — Today's Sprint
metrics.value: $1,649 (21 cycles: standup×5=$225, build×3=$699, publish×2=$110, design×4=$240, community×3=$123, eod×4=$252)
